transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling the National Bank customer support.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: My name is Omar.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Hi Omar, my name is Sarah.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: I'm really weird.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: I think my card was stolen.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: I was at the mall this afternoon and they can't find it anywhere.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: I checked my bag three times.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: I'm sorry to hear that Sarah.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: That must be very stressful.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Don't worry.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: I'm going to help you right away.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: First, let me verify your identity.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Can you please confirm your date of birth and last four digits of your account number?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Sure.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: My date of birth is the 15th of March 1995 and the last four digits are 7742.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Thank you Sarah.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: I've verified your identity successfully.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: I'm going to block your card immediately to prevent any unauthorized transactions.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Done.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Your card has been blocked as of right now.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: No one can use it.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Oh, thank goodness.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Are there any suspicious transactions I should know about?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Let me check your recent transactions.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: I can see your last transaction was at a coffee shop at 2.15pm today for 45 pounds.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Does that sound like you?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Yes, that was me.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: That was just before I realized it was nothing.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Good.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: I don't see any unauthorized transactions after that point.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: I'm also going to raise a fraud investigation reference for you.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Your reference number is FRD-SLASH-2026-8812.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: You'll receive a replacement card within three to five working days and will send it to your

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: registered address.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Perfect.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Thank you.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Actually while I have you, I noticed something on my statement last week.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: I was charged a fee of 75 pounds on a card payment.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: I met online and I have no idea what it's for.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Nobody told me about this fee.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: I understand.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: These kind of fees are completely standard and they are clearly listed in the terms and

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: conditions that you agreed to when you opened your account.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: There's really nothing we can do about it.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: It's a contractual charge.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: But I was never informed about this specific fee.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: 75 pounds is a lot of money.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: I feel like I should have been told.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: I completely understand your frustration, Sarah.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: And I sincerely apologize that it wasn't communicated clearly to you.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: That's not the experience we want you to have.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Let me pull up the transaction right now and take a proper look at it.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: I can see the charge.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: It appears to be a foreign currency conversion fee applied to your online purchase.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: I completely agree that this shouldn't have been disclosed more clearly at the time of

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: the transaction.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: So what can you do about it?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: I'm going to raise a goodwill refund request on your behalf.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: I can't guarantee it will be approved, but given that the fee wasn't clearly communicated,

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: I will escalate it with a note explaining the situation.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: You'll receive an email confirmation within 24 hours with the outcome.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: That's fair.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Thank you.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: I appreciate you looking into it.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Of course.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: So just to summarize what we've done today, I've blocked your stolen card immediately,

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: raised fraud reference, FRD-2026-8812.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: And your replacement card will arrive in three to five working days.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: I've also raised a goodwill refund request for the 75 pounds fee.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: And you'll hear back by email within 24 hours.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Is there anything else I can help you with today?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: No, that covers everything.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Thank you so much, Omar.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: You were really helpful.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling National Bank, Sarah.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: I hope your day gets better.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Take care and goodbye.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Goodbye.
